visaTypes.name: Visa Exemption (Tourist)
visaTypes.extensionDetails: 30-day extension at local immigration office, fee: 1,900 THB

data.extensionRules: Visa exemption extendable once for 30 days at local immigration office.
data.fees: Visa exemption: free. TR visa: ~$40. Extension: 1,900 THB.
data.applicationProcess: Visa exemption: no application needed, granted on arrival. TR visa: apply at consulate before travel.
notes: Land border entries limited to 2 per calendar year on visa exemption
